name: daily-vuln-bulletin-email
description: Generate and deliver a verified daily vulnerability bulletin with live Feishu subscribers and audited domestic-mail MIME delivery.

interface.shortDescription: 生成并审计每日漏洞播报邮件
interface.longDescription: Package the verified daily vulnerability bulletin workflow: authoritative engineering sync, live Feishu subscribers, severity-safe text and HTML content, exact RFC Subject and MIME checks, recipient-header privacy checks, domestic SMTP delivery, and exact IMAP Message-ID readback. The plugin reuses existing lark-cli and IMAP/SMTP capabilities instead of shipping a second mail or Feishu API implementation.
defaultPrompt: 生成并发送今天的每日漏洞播报
审计每日漏洞播报邮件的 Subject、MIME 和收件人隐私
检查最近一次漏洞播报的 IMAP 原始邮件回读结果
